This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Property counter-set value 'a 1 b 2 c 3 d 4 e 5'
  assert_equals: expected "a 1 b 2 c 3 d 4 e 5" but got "a 1 c 3 e 5 d 4 b 2"
[FAIL] Property counter-set value 'a 1 b 2 c 3 a 4 b 5'
  assert_equals: expected "a 1 b 2 c 3 a 4 b 5" but got "c 3 a 4 b 5"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
